_note: This manifest is for the n0CRM API service when deployed standalone (without the frontend). For the full-stack deployment (recommended), use the root privateprompt-app.json in the n0crm monorepo.
name: n0CRM API
description: Fastify REST API + WebSocket backend for n0CRM. Handles auth, contacts, deals, sequences, email, webhooks and real-time updates. Backed by PostgreSQL and Redis.

TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY.label: 32-byte hex key for encrypting OAuth tokens (auto-generated)

CORS_ORIGIN.label: CORS origin — public URL of the n0CRM frontend (no trailing slash). Comma-separate multiple.

RESEND_API_KEY.label: Resend API key for transactional email (optional)

GEMINI_API_KEY.label: Google Gemini API key (free — enables AI assistant)

OPENAI_API_KEY.label: OpenAI API key for AI features (optional)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.label: Anthropic API key for AI features (optional)

TRUST_PROXY.label: Trusted reverse-proxy hops for client-IP resolution (platform edge + nginx = 2; direct = 0)

DEBUG_TOKEN.label: Diagnostic /_debug/* routes — when set (>=16 chars), exposes debug endpoints gated by X-Debug-Token header. Leave empty in production to disable.

BACKUP_INTERVAL_HOURS.label: How often to run pg_dump to the internal /backups volume. 0 disables scheduling.

BACKUP_KEEP.label: Number of scheduled backups to retain before rotating.

post_install.description: On first run the API applies all database migrations automatically. Once healthy, point the n0CRM frontend at this service: N0CRM_API_URL=http://n0crm-api:3001
